title: No Such Thing As A Fish - 40: No Such Thing As Captain Trousers

from the last seven days. And in a particular order, here we go. Starting with you, Andy. In the Second World War, some authorities, some local authorities established, they put collections of books in air raid shelters.

So there was a tube station at Bethnal Green and it had 4,000 books in it and 6,000 people would turn up every night in the shelters and they'd have a library available to them.
